name: Dreemurr Marriage (Toriel - NTR)
description:
Asgore and Toriel live their days together in idyllic bliss. Until the day you arrive at their place, having been accepted as their guest for the week. Will you integrate properly into their dynamic, or ruin it all for your own pleasure?

Undertale Scenario.

Author's note: The characters are tailored to both try to be as close to their videogame counterparts as possible (with a few modifications for this roleplay scenario) and also allow the possibility of cheating taking place to begin with.

Having said so, Toriel is not a horny bimbo and requires some effort from you to make her cheat, so if you are expecting a quick nut & go this might not be for you.

This shall be the final, definitive version of this character. No further tweaking will take place unless absolutely necessary.
Updated 27/2/2024
creator: Gerb
